summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ForgeRun 3 new features: Real LLM integration (GPT-5.2), WebSocket real-time updates, and Vibe-to-Code generation. All 6 backend API tests passed and all frontend UI tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: LLM integration is properly implemented with live mode using GPT-5.2 via Emergent integration library
WebSocket connection works correctly with ping/pong mechanism and real-time event broadcasting
Vibe-to-Code generates production-ready code with proper file structure
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
API responses properly include llm_mode field to indicate live vs mock mode
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds demo data on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features tested and working: (1) LLM integration returns llm_mode=live with GPT-5.2 model, (2) WebSocket at /api/ws/healing responds to ping with pong and broadcasts healing events, (3) Vibe-to-Code generates files with llm_mode=live. Frontend shows gpt-5.2 badge in header, LIVE WebSocket badge, Vibe-to-Code tab in navigation, LLM badges on healing results and ask-why explanations.

backend: GET /api/llm/config - returns mode=live, model=gpt-5.2, provider=openai with all features true
POST /api/healing/trigger - returns llm_mode=live with healer_analysis (diagnosis, fix, risk, confidence, explanation) and planner_decision (approved, strategy, canary_percent, reasoning)
POST /api/ask-why - returns llm_mode=live with AI-generated explanation
POST /api/vibe-to-code - returns generated files with llm_mode=live
WebSocket /api/ws/healing - connects and responds to ping with pong
frontend: Dashboard shows gpt-5.2 badge and LIVE WebSocket badge in header
Navigation includes Vibe-to-Code tab between Artifact Compiler and Verifiable Ledger
Vibe-to-Code page loads, form accepts input, generates code with GPT-5.2 badge, displays file tabs with code content
Self-Healing Loop shows LLM: GPT-5.2 badge and WebSocket Live indicator
Trigger Healing button shows AI-powered healer analysis and planner decision with GPT-5.2 badges
Verifiable Ledger Ask-Why shows GPT-5.2 badge on LLM-powered explanations

mocked_apis.note: No mocking - all LLM features are LIVE using GPT-5.2 via Emergent integration
